other_findings.finding: NK cells express higher levels of GZMM and GZMK in fetal skin compared to adult NK cells, suggesting functional competence from early development
Adult NK cells are CD161(KLRB1)+ CD3(CD3D/CD3G)- and distinguished from ILC1/NK transitional cells by high KLRD1, GNLY, PRF1, GZMB and FCGR3A

evidence_quotes.quote: NK (KLRD1+, GNLY+, PRF1+, GZMB+ and FCGR3A+) cells
evidence_quotes.source_file: Reynolds et al. (2021) PDF full text
evidence_quotes.context: NK cell marker definition in adult skin

evidence_quotes.quote: Fetal NK cells correlate with adult NK cells, but express higher levels of GZMM and GZMK
evidence_quotes.source_file: Reynolds et al. (2021) PDF full text
